ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent on which the country is located */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* International Organization for Standardization (ISO) code for the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the continent where the country is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic coordinates of the country (latitude) */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic coordinates of the country (longitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster */,
  "cluster_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cluster */,
  "cluster_type" TEXT /* Type of cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the statistics were recorded */,
  "new_cases_per_million" REAL /* Number of new cases per million people */,
  "new_deaths_per_million" REAL /* Number of new deaths per million people */,
  "new_tests_per_thousand" REAL /* Number of new tests per thousand people */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Cumulative total of cases */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Cumulative total of deaths */,
  "recovery_rate" REAL /* Percentage of recovered cases */,
  "test_positivity_rate" REAL /* Percentage of positive test results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_statistics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_statistics_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the platform */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action taken by the user */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the source */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data source is updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being shared */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient organization */,
  "sharing_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was shared */,
  "sharing_type" TEXT /* Type of data sharing */,
  "sharing_status" TEXT /* Status of the data sharing request */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the shared data will expire or be revoked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* Type of prediction */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Predicted outcome */,
  "prediction_model" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model used for prediction */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health resource */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of health resource */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the resource */,
  "resource_category" TEXT /* Category of the health resource */,
  "resource_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the health resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_resources_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination campaign */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the vaccination campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the vaccination campaign */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine used in the campaign */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Percentage of population vaccinated */,
  "vaccine_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vaccine used in the campaign */,
  "doses_administered" INTEGER /* Number of vaccine doses administered during the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_campaigns_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
